How to Order

Simple as 1, 2, 3

01
Browse & DM Us
Find what you love and send us a DM on Instagram. We respond fast!
02
We Print & Craft
Your order goes into production with premium filaments and resins.
03
Delivered to You
Carefully packaged and shipped across India. International shipping available!
50+
Happy Customers
Our Story

Born from a
love for making.

LayerLlama Labs started in a bedroom with a single printer and a big obsession. We were tired of boring, mass-produced products — so we started making our own, layer by layer.

Every item is printed in-house, finished by hand, and checked before it ships. No factory floors, no cutting corners. Just craft, care, and a llama who takes quality very seriously.

🖨️ In-House Printing 🎨 Hand Finished 📦 Shipped with Love ⚡ Fast Turnaround
